projectDescription: A React-based digital menu and ordering web app for GMV Burger, letting customers browse burgers, manage a shopping cart with local persistence, and send orders directly via WhatsApp.
keyFeatures: Interactive digital burger menu with product images, prices, and popularity badges
Fully functional shopping cart with add, remove, and quantity adjustment
LocalStorage cart persistence across browser sessions
One-click WhatsApp order dispatch with auto-formatted order summary
Responsive design optimized for both mobile and desktop
Floating mobile cart button with live item count badge
publicApiSurface: addToCart(burger) — adds a burger item to the cart or increments its quantity
updateQuantity(id, delta) — increments or decrements a cart item's quantity
removeItem(id) — removes a cart item entirely
getTotal() — returns the sum of all cart item prices
getCartCount() — returns the total number of items in the cart
sendWhatsAppOrder() — composes and opens a WhatsApp URL with the full order summary
burgers[] — static data array defining all menu items (id, name, price, ingredients, badge, image, isPopular)
